Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(s['DisplayName'], '->', s.get\('Hotkey'\)\) for s in d]")

PowerShell($dll = "$env:USERPROFILE\\.nuget\\packages\\naudio\\2.3.0\\lib\\net6.0-windows7.0\\NAudio.dll"; $asm = [Reflection.Assembly]::ReflectionOnlyLoadFrom\($dll\); try { $types = $asm.GetTypes\(\) } catch { $types = $_.Exception.Types }; $types | Where-Object { $_ -ne $null -and $_.Name -match "Mp3|MediaFoundation|Encoder|Lame" } | Select-Object -ExpandProperty FullName)

Bash(find "/c/Users/Osaid.DESKTOP-OKA0Q57/.nuget/packages/naudio.core/2.3.0" -name "*.dll" | head -5 && strings "/c/Users/Osaid.DESKTOP-OKA0Q57/.nuget/packages/naudio.core/2.3.0/lib/netstandard2.0/NAudio.Core.dll" 2>/dev/null | grep -iE "Mp3|MediaFoundation|Encoder|Acm" | sort -u | head -30)

Bash(xargs '-I{}' sh -c 'f="{}"; result=$\(dotnet-ildasm "$f" 2>/dev/null | grep -iE "Mp3FileWriter|MediaFoundationEncoder|LameMp3" | head -3\); if [ -n "$result" ]; then echo "=== $f ==="; echo "$result"; fi')

PowerShell($dll = "$env:USERPROFILE\\.nuget\\packages\\naudio\\2.3.0\\lib\\net6.0-windows7.0\\NAudio.dll"; $bytes = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllBytes\($dll\); $text = [System.Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetString\($bytes\); $text | Select-String -Pattern "WaveFile|AcmEncoder|MediaFoundation" -AllMatches | Select-Object -ExpandProperty Matches | Select-Object -ExpandProperty Value | Sort-Object -Unique)
